chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-448 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 6760/2022 19.05.2022 Although no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioners as despite the fact that they have moved an urgent application but we have gone through the prayer clause of the petition. They seek their names to be mutated in the record as being legal heirs of their deceased grandfather namely Syed Pir Noor Shah in respect of the “all properties” left by the deceased in District Matiari and Hyderabad under Foti Khata Badal in the light of a decision taken by Honourable Superior Court. We are afraid that such prayer cannot be granted as claimed in this petition under Article 199. It requires an adjudication before a civil court having jurisdiction both territorial and pecuniary. The petition being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
